ab: maru ku ahlalua hlahlusa cacihli, pia ʉlʉnganʉ kana’ana, laihla ucani caihli kana’ana mamisa.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫ʉlʉnganʉ，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is ʉlʉnganʉ, he is 11 years old.

ab: kikucu a mu ma ariatʉkʉrana umaiiapʉ.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: ihlaku nua ahlalua  hlahlusa rianʉ marumuku pahlusahli.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: marumuku aku makahlangulu, maru maci taluavaʉlʉ, kiʉlʉsʉ ucani pihlingi a mu musa makahlangulu.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: marumuku ku pautuahlangi laʉlaʉvʉ varu’u, acahli a mu pahlulʉsʉ pahlusahli hla makahlangulu.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
